key.name: source-kind
key.description: Allowed values are mock and codex-app-server.

key.name: mock-scenario
key.description: Scenario used by the development mock source.

key.name: codex-command
key.description: Executable path for the Codex CLI used by the app-server source.

key.name: timeout-seconds
key.description: Seconds to wait for a provider refresh before timing out.

key.name: warning-threshold-percent
key.description: Percent remaining at or below which a bucket is shown as warning.

key.name: display-format
key.description: Allowed values are bucket-percent, percent-only, and state-label.

key.name: bucket-priority
key.description: Allowed values are lowest, five-hour, and weekly.
